fo'ofo|ky;] dycqjxh [foKkiu&III@4@vlk-@441@16] CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF KARNATAKA (Established by an Act of Parliament) NOTIFICATION Gulbarga, the 8th February, 2017 No. CUK/GOV/F-101/2016-17/1261.—The following is published for general information : Statute 42 42- Constitution on Planning and Monitoring Board (1) There shall be a Planning & Monitoring Board of the University which shall advise generally on the planning and development activities of the University and monitor the standard of academic and physical development of the University. (2) The constitution of the Planning & Monitoring Board and manner of appointment of members shall be as under: (a) The Vice Chancellor, who shall be the Chairman (b) Pro Vice Chancellor (c) Two Deans of the Schools to be nominated by the Vice Chancellor (d) Three Experts, known for their expertise/special interests in planning and development of higher education, to be nominated by the Executive Council (e) Three Experts, known for their expertise/special interest in the planning and development of higher education, to be nominated by the Vice Chancellor (f) The Registrar of the University (g) The Finance Officer of the University (h) The person designated by the Vice Chancellor as the Planning & Development Officer or the OSD (Planning & Development) shall be the Member Secretary. (3) The terms of the office of the members other than the ex-officio members, shall be three years from the date of their appointment and they shall be eligible for reappointment. (4) The powers and functions of the Planning & Monitoring Board shall be such as may be prescribed by the Ordinance. Prof. CHANDRAKANT M. YATANOOR, Registrar of Central University of Karnataka, Kalaburagi [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./441/16] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 8 of 13 -- -- 9 of 13 -- -- 10 of 13 -- -- 11 of 13 -- -- 12 of 13 -- -- 13 of 13 --
